title: DiGiorno
summary: DiGiorno is a brand of frozen pizzas sold in the United States, and is a subsidiary of Nestlé. In 2023, Nestlé discontinued sales of Delissio pizzas in Canada.
extract: DiGiorno (previously sold in Canada as Delissio) is a brand of frozen pizzas sold in the United States, and is a subsidiary of Nestlé. In 2023, Nestlé discontinued sales of Delissio pizzas in Canada.
